debug_info.goal:
A E : Fin 8
hE : E = A + 4
a : ℕ → ℕ
ha_def : ∀ (n : ℕ), a n = Fintype.card { p // A + ∑ i, ↑↑(p i) = E }
n : ℕ
hn : 0 < n
⊢ a (2 * n - 1) = 0

    have : ∀ i, ((p i : ℤ) : ZMod 2) = 1 := fun i => by

    cases n with

      simp [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
      norm_num
  simp [h_odd] at h_mod

  have h1 (i : Fin (2 * n - 1)) : ((p i : Fin 8) : ZMod 2) = 1 := by
    rcases Int.units_eq_one_or (p i) with h | h <;> simp [h]
  have h2 : (2 * n - 1 : ZMod 2) = 1 := by
    cases n with | zero => cases hn | succ n => simp [Nat.mul_succ]
  simp [hE, h1, h2] at hp
